data.body:
SUBSTRATE MAP complete (Explore subagent). Key facts for implementation:
- attest substrate at src/rebar/attest/: dsse.py (Envelope+PAE), registry.py (POLICY dict populated at import via register_* calls; Policy=(scheme,namespace); verify() pins scheme from POLICY[kind], never envelope — RFC8725 anti-alg-confusion), sshsig.py (asymmetric Ed25519 via ssh-keygen -Y; trust_root=allowed_signers blob, keyid=principal), hmac_legacy.py (LEGACY_KINDS plan-review/completion-verifier), authorship.py (rebar.authorship.v1; commit-ancestry era validity: verify_authorship_at_commit uses resolve_event_commit + git merge-base --is-ancestor; intra-commit refinement via {timestamp}-{uuid} position; key_not_valid_at_era surfaced by CLI reclassification).
- CHILD 368c PLAN: add src/rebar/attest/opcert.py mirroring authorship.py — OPCERT_KIND/NAMESPACE=rebar.opcert.v1, register_opcert_policy() pins sshsig; sign_opcert + in-toto subject Statement binding {ticket_id, material_fingerprint, merged-log position}; era-validity reusing authorship commit-ancestry (env keyring). Register in attest/__init__.py.
- Plan-review lives at src/rebar/llm/plan_review/ (NOT top-level). material fingerprint: llm/plan_review/attest.py manifest_material/current_material_fingerprint. signing.py sign_manifest/verify_signature is the HMAC op-cert path (target of 8f1d removal). verify_signature_result.schema.json already has key_not_valid_at_era verdict.
- merge-gate to extend (4214): .github/workflows/verify-identity.yaml -> rebar verify-identity (src/rebar/_commands/verify_authorship.py; walks merged log, ENFORCE_SINCE grandfather).
- ADR 0046 (security posture, L1-L5 limits) NOT on origin/main — lives in worktree rebar-adr0046 branch adr-0046-security-posture. Docs task 6a89 must xref it; may need to bring it in.
- Tests: tests/unit/test_attest_*.py + _heldout.py companions ARE the held-out TDD pattern this skill mandates. Model opcert tests on test_attest_sshsig.py (+heldout) and test_identity_ts2_09f9.py (era, real git store fixture).
IN PROGRESS: epic 6d0d + child 368c plan-reviews running as bg jobs (heavy 4-pass, >8min each). Blocked on both passing before I can claim 368c (cascades to claim open epic). NOT yet claimed anything.
